text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a clear blue day, I decide to have lunch on the roof... But when I
go up, I see that someone's beaten me there.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... Sure! Oh good, it sounds like everyone's doing well.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Me? Yeah, I'm getting along fine... Oh, you heard about the tryout
race?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Uh, yeah, about that... You see, I haven't found a trainer yet. Right,
so my debut's gonna have to stay on hold—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's not that they're not good enough! They're just... you know,
missing something.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh... Mhm, thanks. I know you're all rooting for me, so I won't let
you down!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right then... Okay, talk to you later.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Pheeeeew...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wah! Oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wah! Oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, were you planning on having lunch here? Sorry for taking up
the place.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You sure know how to pick a spot. Eating up here in this lovely
weather's a wonderful idea.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You sure know how to pick a spot. Eating up here in this lovely
weather's a wonderful idea.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It would be really refreshing... Sigh.
choice_data_list: I take it the call didn't go well?
I take it the call didn't go well?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, the call just now?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, not at all! Those were my cute little juniors back home. I enjoy
talking to them all the time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We've kept in touch since I switched schools and came to Tracen.
They're good kids.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, if they hadn't talked me into it, I'd never have considered
coming to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha, is it that unbelievable? Well, it's true.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You mentioned it before, but I only run because of how much fun I
have doing it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You mentioned it before, but I only run because of how much fun I
have doing it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But before I knew it, everyone was looking up to me... They told me
they want to see me out there winning.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm like their big sis—how could I let them down?
choice_data_list: And so you joined Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, that's all there is to it, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ah, Maruzensky! Hey, Maruzenskyyy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Heeey! Off to do some training? Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thaaanks! I'm gonna put everything you taught me to good use! See
you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Have fuuun! And stay safe out there!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, isn't she cute?
choice_data_list:
I see you're popular with the younger students
here too.

I see you're popular with the younger students
here too.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm really grateful. They're all such nice kids.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And that one—she has a terribly shy little sister who was so scared to
go out, she'd just stay cooped up in her room.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But they went and saw the Twinkle Series together and had loads of
fun. Now she's not scared to go out at all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The older one wants to keep showing her sister more amazing things,
so that's why she's trying so hard here at school.
choice_data_list: What a nice goal to have.
What a nice goal to have.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Isn't it?! I think it's just fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Like a dazzling dream even.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's your dream? I really wanna know!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's your dream? I really wanna know!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
For a training specialist at the famous Tracen Academy, I bet yours is
to train a G1 racer, right? Or maybe you have more worldly
ambitions?
choice_data_list: Sure, I'd be proud to train someone like that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course. That's what every trainer wants, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The trainers here especially are all excellent. They're really driven to
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I... wish I had the same energy to match it.
choice_data_list: You shouldn't push yourself if it's not there.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, look at you. You really are strange, just like I thought.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, look at you. You really are strange, just like I thought.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Listen for a sec. At this very moment, on this roof, there's a trainer
and a racer, both of whom are free.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Listen for a sec. At this very moment, on this roof, there's a trainer
and a racer, both of whom are free.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And you like my running so much that I catch you watching me
whenever you can.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And you like my running so much that I catch you watching me
whenever you can.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My heart's dancing, 'cause I've finally met a trainer who isn't all gung
ho about winning the biggest prize.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, in light of our present circumstances... is there anything special
you'd like to ask me?
choice_data_list: I'd love to be your trainer, if you'll have me.
I'd love to be your trainer, if you'll have me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, in light of our present circumstances... is there anything special
you'd like to ask me?
choice_data_list: I'd love to be your trainer, if you'll have me.
I'd love to be your trainer, if you'll have me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, good, you know how to take a hint! And you nailed it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, good, you know how to take a hint! And you nailed it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you. I'd love to have you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I look forward to working together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I look forward to working together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I've become Maruzensky's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Now that we're formally partners, can I ask you a
favor real quick?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The little ones said that calling is fine and all, but they'd rather use
something called a "chat app."

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I can't figure it out. Is that something different from texting?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the first thing I get to work on is... explaining what a chat app is.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, so those things are called "apps"... Phones these days are so
complicated.
